text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 91 

PRVDR_DBA_NAME 

LABEL: Provider Doing Business as (DBA) Name 

DESCRIPTION: The provider’s name that is commonly used by the public when the “doing business as” (DBA) name is 
different than the legal name. Registering a DBA is required to operate a business under a name that 
differs from the company's legal name, most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME:
